seo.title: Spawnly | Premium Game Server Hosting
seo.description: High-performance game servers for Minecraft, Satisfactory, and more. Pay hourly, control everything.

hero.subtitle: Containerized hosting for Minecraft and Satisfactory. Experience zero-lag NVMe performance, fractional hourly billing, and absolute control via our custom-built management panel.

carousel.title: Library
carousel.subtitle: Select a title to deploy your dedicated server.
carousel.drag_instruction: Drag left or right to explore

access.title: Raw Access & Control.
access.desc: Stop relying on FTP clients. Our built-in web file manager lets you edit configs, upload worlds, and manage mods directly from your browser. Pair that with our live WebSocket console to issue commands in real-time.

teams.title: Built for Teams.
teams.desc: Don't share your password. Use our advanced Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to invite friends or admins to your server. Grant them specific permissions like 'Start/Stop', 'Edit Files', or 'View Console' safely.

features.title: Everything you need to host.
features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools built specifically for community leaders and game server admins.

billing.title: Fractional Hourly Billing
billing.desc: Top up credits via Stripe and pay strictly for the hours your server is online. Turn it off, and the meter stops instantly.

schedules.title: Automated Schedules
schedules.desc: Set up cron jobs to automatically restart your server, send broadcast commands to players, or trigger routine backups while you sleep.

mods.title: 1-Click Mod Manager
mods.desc: Deep integration with CurseForge and SteamCMD. Search, install, and update modpacks and server plugins with a single click.

world.title: World Management
world.desc: Upload your existing single-player saves directly to the cloud, or download your server's map to keep a local copy safe.

backups.title: Secure Backups
backups.desc: Never lose progress. Create manual restore points instantly, or rely on our automated backup system to keep your data safe.

isolation.title: Hard Isolation
isolation.desc: Every server runs in a dedicated Docker/Kubernetes container environment, guaranteeing your CPU and RAM are never throttled by noisy neighbors.

cta.title: Ready to start your community?
cta.subtitle: Create an account, add credits, and have your server online in less than 60 seconds.

features.ddos_desc: Enterprise-grade Cloudflare and Hetzner DDoS mitigation comes standard.
features.nvme_desc: Say goodbye to save-pauses. Our Gen4 NVMe drives ensure instant saving and chunk loading.

seo.title: Supported Games | Spawnly
seo.description: Browse our full catalog of supported dedicated servers including Minecraft, Rust, Palworld, and more.

hero.title: Choose your Game
hero.subtitle: From hardcore survival to lightweight indie co-op, we provide the performance you need to host your community.

minecraft.desc: Instantly deploy high-performance servers with full plugin and modpack support.
minecraft.long_desc: Experience Minecraft hosting without limits. Whether you are running a lightweight vanilla server for friends or a massive BungeeCord network with 200+ mods, our NVMe storage and dedicated CPUs ensure zero tick-lag and lightning-fast chunk generation.

satisfactory.desc: Build massive factories without lag. Optimized for continuous background processing.
satisfactory.long_desc: The factory must grow. Host your Satisfactory 1.0 dedicated server on hardware built for heavy logistics. Our servers stay online 24/7, meaning your factory keeps producing resources even while you sleep.

rust.desc: Survive the wipe with extreme NVMe performance for seamless monument loading.
rust.long_desc: Rust servers require incredible single-core performance. Our fleet delivers exactly that, preventing rubber-banding during intense PvP firefights. Includes seamless 1-click Oxide/uMod installation.

palworld.desc: Capture, battle, and build with friends on high-performance infrastructure.
palworld.long_desc: Host your own Palworld dedicated server. Tame Pals, build massive bases, and explore a vast open world with up to 32 players. Our servers are optimized for high memory allocation to prevent memory leaks.

valheim.desc: Explore the tenth world with seamless Viking survival hosting and BepInEx support.
valheim.long_desc: Conquer the mythical realm of Valheim with friends. We provide robust hosting with easy crossplay support, instant backups, and manual BepInEx mod injection.

ark_sa.desc: Dinosaur survival reimagined. Hosted on extreme NVMe drives for fast loading.
ark_sa.long_desc: Survive the definitive ARK experience. Built on Unreal Engine 5, ARK: SA requires serious hardware. Our premium tiers provide the heavy-duty RAM and CPU needed for smooth dino-taming.

ark_se.desc: The classic survival experience. Ready for massive mod lists and custom maps.
ark_se.long_desc: Host classic ARK: Survival Evolved. Perfect for massive mod lists, custom maps, and large tribes looking to dominate the Island.

factorio.desc: The factory must grow. Enjoy perfectly synchronized, lag-free automation.
factorio.long_desc: Host a Factorio headless server. Manage sprawling logistics networks and infinite automation lines without dropping a single UPS. Perfect for massive megabases.

project_zomboid.desc: This is how you died. Massive, seamless multiplayer zombie survival hosting.
project_zomboid.long_desc: Survive Knox Country with your friends. Our servers handle vast zombie hordes, complex mod lists, and persistent chunk loading flawlessly.

gmod.desc: Limitless sandbox fun with instant Steam Workshop integration and fastDL.
gmod.long_desc: Host TTT, DarkRP, or Sandbox. Features 1-click Steam Workshop integration so your server downloads addons and mounts them instantly.

cs2.desc: Sub-tick precision hosting for the ultimate competitive edge and community servers.
cs2.long_desc: Experience the new era of Counter-Strike. Our high-frequency CPUs ensure Source 2’s sub-tick architecture performs exactly as intended for community servers and scrims.

arma3.desc: Massive military simulation with heavy Workshop mod support and reliable performance.
arma3.long_desc: Deploy massive combined-arms operations. Our Arma 3 servers automatically parse and mount your Steam Workshop collections, copying keys securely to the root folder.

arma_reforger.desc: Next-gen military simulation hosting with powerful native modding tools.
arma_reforger.long_desc: Experience the Enfusion engine. Arma Reforger hosting offers built-in mod management and crossplay support for PC and Xbox players.

space_engineers.desc: Build, mine, and explore the stars with friends without physics lag.
space_engineers.long_desc: Conquer the solar system. Our infrastructure utilizes advanced Wine compatibility layers to run the Windows-only Space Engineers dedicated server seamlessly on high-performance Linux hardware.

seven_days_to_die.desc: Survive the blood moon horde with native high-performance hosting.
seven_days_to_die.long_desc: Prepare for the 7th night. Host your own 1.0 dedicated server with fast NVMe loading times for vast voxel destruction and horde management.

conan_exiles.desc: Survive, build, and dominate the Exiled Lands with flawless performance.
conan_exiles.long_desc: Crush your enemies in the Exiled Lands. Our Conan Exiles servers utilize our high-performance Wine wrapper to deliver seamless, lag-free survival combat.

dayz.desc: Survive the post-apocalypse with heavy modding support and high tick rates.
dayz.long_desc: The ultimate hardcore survival game. We support 1-click Steam Workshop installations to easily mount map overhauls like Namalsk or Deer Isle.

enshrouded.desc: Explore a massive voxel-based continent with up to 16 players in seamless co-op.
enshrouded.long_desc: Host an Enshrouded server for up to 16 players. Build magnificent voxel castles and explore the shroud with our high-clock CPUs powering the backend.

sons_of_the_forest.desc: Build and survive against mutants in a terrifying forest with zero lag.
sons_of_the_forest.long_desc: Host your terrifying co-op adventure. Our servers provide massive RAM allocation to handle sprawling bases and aggressive mutant AI without skipping a beat.

v_rising.desc: Awaken as a vampire, rebuild your castle, and rule the night with friends.
v_rising.long_desc: Rule Vardoran. Set up a private PvE realm or a brutal PvP server. High-performance hosting ensures your vampire combat remains sharp and responsive.

core_keeper.desc: Mine, build, and explore in this underground co-op adventure.
core_keeper.long_desc: Host a persistent underground world. Core Keeper uses minimal resources, making it a perfect, affordable server to run for your friend group 24/7.

squad.desc: 50v50 tactical shooter with robust server performance for large-scale operations.
squad.long_desc: Power your clan's 100-player operations. Squad relies heavily on high-frequency processors to maintain 50 TPS. We deliver the compute power your community needs.

insurgency_sandstorm.desc: Intense close-quarters combat and objective-based multiplayer.
insurgency_sandstorm.long_desc: Host lightning-fast, high-tickrate Insurgency servers. Complete support for Steam Workshop maps and mutators right from our dashboard.

unturned.desc: Free-to-play survival with a massive community and extensive mod support.
unturned.long_desc: Host lightweight, fast, and easily moddable Unturned servers. Perfect for large communities looking to install RocketMod and custom Steam Workshop assets.

tf2.desc: Classic class-based shooter hosting with instant FastDL integration.
tf2.long_desc: Keep the classic alive. Host 24/7 2Fort, Jump maps, or MGE servers with full SourceMod/MetaMod support and ultra-low latency.

l4d2.desc: Survive the apocalypse with seamless custom campaign and mod support.
l4d2.long_desc: Host 8-player Versus or 4-player Co-op. Fully supports Steam Workshop custom campaigns and SourceMod for intense, heavily modified director AI.

dst.desc: Uncompromising wilderness survival game full of science and magic.
dst.long_desc: Survive together. DST servers are incredibly lightweight, meaning you can host massive mega-worlds for your friends at a fraction of the cost.

terraria.desc: Dig, fight, explore, and build with robust plugin support.
terraria.long_desc: Host cross-platform Terraria servers using TShock. Gain full admin control, world protection, and massive multiplayer support on our lightweight instances.

stardew_valley.desc: Farm, forage, and build a community with seamless multiplayer hosting.
stardew_valley.long_desc: Host a persistent 24/7 farm for you and your friends. We utilize open-source headless wrappers to keep your Stardew Valley world alive even when you log off.
